meaning: n.法令,政令,教令,天命,判决v.颁布
examples: An official decree invalidated the vote in the capital.
In July he issued a decree ordering all unofficial armed groups in the country to disband.
He backed a provision that would allow judges to delay granting a divorce decree in some cases.
This decree belongs where those PCBs are buried in the silt of the Hudson.
The otherwise worthless piece of paper in your wallet conveys value because of government decree.
